entity.summary: Estonia-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange operating since 2018 through Coinmetro OÜ, with an Estonian Financial Intelligence Unit virtual-asset-service licence and documented supervisory history.
entity.notes: Official and independent material support the 2018 operating year and Estonian operator. The Estonian FIU published compliance precepts concerning missing own-funds auditor reports in 2024 and 2025; Coinmetro subsequently announced renewal of its FIU licence in May 2026. The record distinguishes continued licensing from endorsement by the regulator.

expected.summary: Estonia-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the Coinmetro brand.

changes.summary: Estonia-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange operating since 2018 through Coinmetro OÜ, with an Estonian Financial Intelligence Unit virtual-asset-service licence and documented supervisory history.
changes.notes: Official and independent material support the 2018 operating year and Estonian operator. The Estonian FIU published compliance precepts concerning missing own-funds auditor reports in 2024 and 2025; Coinmetro subsequently announced renewal of its FIU licence in May 2026. The record distinguishes continued licensing from endorsement by the regulator.

events.title: Coinmetro began operating in 2018
events.description: Coinmetro began operating as an Estonia-based cryptocurrency exchange in 2018.
events.notes: The reviewed sources establish the year but not an exact public launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

events.title: Estonian FIU issued compliance precepts to Coinmetro OÜ
events.description: The Estonian Financial Intelligence Unit published supervisory precepts concerning Coinmetro OÜ's failure to submit required auditor reporting on own funds in July 2024 and again in July 2025.
events.notes: The public entries document compliance deficiencies but do not record withdrawal or suspension of licence FVT000126.

events.title: Coinmetro announced renewal of its Estonian FIU licence
events.description: Coinmetro announced that Coinmetro OÜ had secured renewal of its Estonian Financial Intelligence Unit virtual-asset-service licence.
events.notes: Licence status is recorded as a regulatory operating milestone, not as an endorsement or guarantee by the FIU.

evidence.title: Coinmetro: Advancing Access for All Since 2018
evidence.notes: Official retrospective describes Coinmetro's operation since 2018.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Coinmetro
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the Coinmetro identity, Estonia registration, and 2018 establishment year.

evidence.title: Estonian FIU precepts involving virtual-asset service providers
evidence.notes: The regulator's English precepts list records the July 18, 2024 entry for Coinmetro OÜ, licence FVT000126, concerning an unsubmitted own-funds auditor report.

evidence.title: Estonian FIU supervisory precepts list
evidence.notes: The regulator's Estonian list records a further July 16, 2025 Coinmetro OÜ precept concerning an unsubmitted own-funds auditor report.

evidence.title: Coinmetro Secures Renewed FIU License in Estonia
evidence.notes: Official announcement states that Coinmetro secured renewal of its Estonian FIU licence.

evidence.title: Coinmetro terms of use
evidence.notes: Current official terms identify Coinmetro OÜ and its Estonian virtual-asset-service regulatory framework.

evidence.title: Coinmetro official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current Coinmetro identity and active exchange platform.
